channel.title: managers on Dr. Soumyo Maity
channel.description: Recent content in managers on Dr. Soumyo Maity

item.title: Application security for managers
item.description: As a manager, you are responsible for the security of your organization’s applications. This means ensuring that applications are developed, deployed, and operated securely. Here are some key things to keep in mind when it comes to application security: Applications are a target: Applications are a valuable target for attackers. They can be used to steal data, disrupt operations, or even launch attacks on other systems. Applications are complex: Applications are complex pieces of software.
